---
title: Quick Start
---

The following resources are available for you to get started with Qualtrics:

### Qualtrics Basecamp

[Qualtrics Basecamp](https://basecamp.qualtrics.com) is the online learning platform where you have access to learning instructions on how to use Qualtrics.

### Qualtrics Website

[Qualtrics](https://www.qualtrics.com/support/) offers access to an extensive library of knowledge base articles, including detailed instructions on how to use and configure (advance) features.

### Qualtrics Community

The [Qualtrics community](https://www.qualtrics.com/community/) is a platform for all Qualtrics users to ask questions and share experiences. Make sure to log in using Single-Sign On (SSO), and when asked to enter your company's Organization ID, fill in `vuamsterdam`.


### To create a user account and access the Qualtrics environment at the Central Brand, please proceed as follows:

1. Go to: [https://vuamsterdam.eu.qualtrics.com](https://vuamsterdam.eu.qualtrics.com)
2. On the login page, choose: Vrije Universiteit SSO
3. Log in with your VU account credentials (email address and password)

    ![VU's central brand login page](/public/qualtrics-vu-brand-login-page.png)

4. Choose “No, I don’t have a preexisting account here” when it is your first time enrolling the central brand

    ![Qualtrics preexisting account](/public/tools/qualtrics/qualtrics-preexisting-account.png)

5. Click `Sign In`

    ![Qualtrics account created successfully](/public/tools/qualtrics/qualtrics-account-created-successfully.png)

6. Terms of Service or General Terms and Conditions for Qualtrics Services are presented for review and acceptance. 

    ![Qualtrics terms conditions](/public/tools/qualtrics/qualtrics-terms-conditions.png)

> It is recommended to save [VU's Central Brand](https://vuamsterdam.eu.qualtrics.com) as a Favourite or Bookmark link for future reference.
